They’re advancing their dangerous agenda by Defunding the Police, fighting to pack the Supreme Court and impose the radical Green New Deal.

They want to tear at the fabric of America and let’s not forget they want to do it on your dime with taxpayer funded elections.

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: RAPHAEL WARNOCK'S REFUSAL TO ANSWER SHOWS HE FULLY SUPPORTS COURT PACKING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, DECEMBER 7, 2020 RAPHAEL WARNOCK'S REFUSAL TO ANSWER SHOWS HE FULLY SUPPORTS COURT PACKING
ATLANTA - In last night's Atlanta Press Club Debate, Radical Liberal Raphael Warnock repeatedly refused to answer whether or not he supports packing the Supreme Court with liberal justices. This follows a previous interview in which Warnock refused to answer the very same question. His refusal to answer confirms that he would fully support packing the Court -- he just doesn't want Georgia voters to know it.
[Click here or below to watch.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x7eFEEItYiPIZNwKe0dM3cV1aON0kR3_HKtPdiUHGsNiSDIXqO7kMTbWaOaZsWbeUlSAh1Dajk2OPV_podrDc4NlVQp-203EO6z5vJ2uo3JWM5C0ExpVoHtrwzJjK6LTz9fjqVCHheCmR0iGkEXw9sDbCrSWUmAs_RkwG_d0kfJnXehuF0F0_SPaoPfklujsUZjgqeM2kwA=&c=mMPyg9uZ0GH1WaUFEVEu5YN-yimRbuik7OfKwZyqkBLhgppHFhPkGA==&ch=a6jX9Ak2C5dPIFM9wFUz6890k3lEDQoC-fMCmx6cyuuymSY25VOnng==)

---
| "By repeatedly refusing to answer the question, it's clear that radical liberal Raphael Warnock would fully support packing the U.S. Supreme Court with liberal justices. Packing the Supreme Court would be an unchecked power grab -- creating a new legislative branch, fast-tracking the far-left's socialist agenda, and handing radical Democrats permanent power," said Deputy Campaign Manager Stephen Lawson. "Not only would Warnock support Court packing, he would also be a rubber stamp for Chuck Schumer to raise taxes, socialize healthcare, pass the Green New Deal, defund the police, and gut our military. On January 5th, Georgia voters are going to reject Warnock's radical agenda and send a proven leader and businessperson in Kelly Loeffler back to the United States Senate."
---

name: Chris Ekstrom
subject: Trump Wants Us to Win Georgia
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fyuKAfUVJrcqI4c&b=o46PpXtpupIYtJ35zKcVmQ)
---

Hi Peter,

Christopher Ekstrom again here- the conservative, America First businessman, donor, and former Congressional candidate who is working to save the two Georgia Senate seats - but [I](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fyuKAfUVJrcqI4c&b=o46PpXtpupIYtJ35zKcVmQ) [need your help urgently to overcome the limousine liberals](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fyuKAfUVJrcqI4c&b=o46PpXtpupIYtJ35zKcVmQ)!

When our conservative candidates compete against big Hollywood money & lickspittle media support; they MUST be equipped with at least half as much ALL-AMERICAN donor support to WIN! Why can nut-job socialists like Big Stacey Abrams even compete? **Well, get a load of THIS...**

_Thanks to a $1 million contribution from billionaire mega-donor George Soros, the Georgia Democratic Party began the second half of 2018 with three times as much money in the bank as the state’s majority Republican Party, according to new campaign finance reports._

_That’s a turnaround from most recent gubernatorial election years, when the Georgia GOP had big money advantages._

**That's right - if George Soros could nearly buy the governor's mansion for a nut job like Stacey Abrams, he can certainly buy a couple of Senate seats. The problem in 2018 was the Democrats outspent us! That's why we cannot let them outspend us again!**

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fyuKAfUVJrcqI4c&b=o46PpXtpupIYtJ35zKcVmQ)
---

_As a conservative, America First donor myself, I know how important it is to not get killed in the money race in politics. You can't let your liberal opponent have three times as much money as you, and reasonably expect to win!_

Soros has bulked up the Georgia Dems. They are awash in dirty money, and are using it to flip these two U.S. Senate seats!

If the President's legal team can't expose the truth behind his election, _then the Senate will be the only check on Joe Biden and his puppet-master Kamala Harris_ \- and we need to make sure we take BOTH Georgia seats to give Mitch McConnell the ability to stop the Squad's agenda!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fyuKAfUVJrcqI4c&b=o46PpXtpupIYtJ35zKcVmQ)
---

**You have to understand - our Senators are getting outspent by Soros and Bloomberg with all of their Communist Chinese money! **

They already nearly bought the Georgia governor's race. They are financing the steal of the Presidential election too!

They are trying to buy these two U.S. Senate seats- and they will succeed if we can't get Loeffler and Purdue some help!

This is no joke - the AOC agenda will be federal policy if we don't win these Georgia races! We need a Senate firewall - it is so important.

Soros, Hollywood, Bloomberg, and other far-left crazies are dumping millions into this election. [That means we must step up and meet the challenge.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fyuKAfUVJrcqI4c&b=o46PpXtpupIYtJ35zKcVmQ)

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fyuKAfUVJrcqI4c&b=o46PpXtpupIYtJ35zKcVmQ)
---

According to Opensecrets.org, big extreme liberal interests from around the country- not from GA- have bolstered both Democrat Warnock against Loeffler, and Democrat Ossoff against Purdue:

_Thanks to a surge of out-of-state donors in the third quarter, Warnock, a minister, raised $21.7 million. Unlike Loeffler, Warnock did not spend his own money. He was most helped by out-of-state donors, who accounted for almost 80 percent of his funds, and outside spending groups, which spent $5.2 million to help the Democrat make the runoff after winning a plurality of the vote._

_Perdue maintained a fundraising lead over Ossoff until the third quarter, when the Democrat raised a whopping $21.3 million. Overall, Ossoff raised $32.3 million through mid-October, with nearly 40 percent coming from small donors. Like Warnock, Ossoff’s funds come primarily from out-of-state donors. The documentary filmmaker had $4.2 million left in mid-October._

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fyuKAfUVJrcqI4c&b=o46PpXtpupIYtJ35zKcVmQ)
---

Drain the DC Swamp PAC has helped good America-First conservatives like you and me for years, providing vital cover when Soros and Bloomberg start trying to bury conservatives with their billions.

**My friends at Drain the DC Swamp PAC are working overtime to even out the money disadvantage. Our GA Senate candidates are doing great, but they need our help! [Can you help?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fyuKAfUVJrcqI4c&b=o46PpXtpupIYtJ35zKcVmQ)**

_We cannot afford to lose either one of these races! The Democrats running are among the most extreme and crazy we've ever seen. Plus they will let New York's Chuck Schumer create havoc with our money and our liberties!_

We MUST win two of two races there. Right now, this is it- and we are losing the money race because of two crazy liberal billionaires. Our candidates need backup! [Will you help us?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fyuKAfUVJrcqI4c&b=o46PpXtpupIYtJ35zKcVmQ)

Your contribution is so crucial. [Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more (donations to the PAC are unlimited) will send an immediate message to the Left](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fyuKAfUVJrcqI4c&b=o46PpXtpupIYtJ35zKcVmQ)\- that neither Georgia, NOR America is theirs!

The President is fighting. Our two Republican Senators are fighting. You and I must fight as well! [Help us push forward and win in Georgia](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fyuKAfUVJrcqI4c&b=o46PpXtpupIYtJ35zKcVmQ), for America!

Respectfully,
[ ](secure.anedot.com/draintheswamp/st1)
---
|
---

Christopher Ekstrom
Businessman
America First Donor

P.S. Socialists control the House of Representatives and God only knows what they will do. The ONLY firewall we have against all of that is the United States Senate - and that could change if we lose on January 5th in Georgia. [Donate right now to help us save the Senate.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=fyuKAfUVJrcqI4c&b=o46PpXtpupIYtJ35zKcVmQ) We must elect Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rByszEzMnLTsbKysjMxsHLRGtCwcTOzsjGyc) [Change subscriber options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rByszEzMnLTsbKysjMxsHLRGtCwcTOzsjGyc)

name: Team Stanton
subject: Tell Congress to provide relief to American families today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

As the rapid spread of Coronavirus continues, it has begun to overwhelm our healthcare system and damage our economy. Millions of Americans need housing, employment, and medical relief, but the GOP is playing politics once again while Americans suffer.

Senate Republicans led by Mitch McConnell continue to put party politics above the country. It has been months since struggling Americans have seen any relief. Meanwhile millions have lost their jobs, have been evicted, and have lost loved ones to this terrible pandemic.

[Will you sign on and demand that Congress pass the HEROES Act and provide Americans much needed economic relief?](https://act.myngp.com/el/2qyeZyz6KhrBP5YCXrhKeZHIqIU4ZAXQDYhgqGYQRus=/ouixt7fwI_zgxg0pcoMebQ7pLb5ttV_tzHMbG44hRZ4=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/2qyeZyz6KhrBP5YCXrhKeZHIqIU4ZAXQDYhgqGYQRus=/ouixt7fwI_zgxg0pcoMebQ7pLb5ttV_tzHMbG44hRZ4=)

For too long, Senate Republicans have failed to rise above partisan politics, and have allowed American families to struggle while the pandemic impacts their jobs and overall health. Thank you for joining me in holding our representatives accountable.

In solidarity,
_\--Team Stanton_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mIiySAfgrIEzHcrgxXnG2J1-KckGV7dBZPp9gvZGcNaVCdclaUJyzLOmeHDuZipxsHhRcldcgDyLy6sJIyBdBariCC00U1XnJD9kY_GZQVjsmdljPR1KAgkP02BlP0b-UCqQ8Mc6WyU=&c=MYJ4swq48ferHJ-jIYGyPBADRGXdCR4aGnK1OS93davrOcQhZewzOQ==&ch=s5Xe50ohn4Gz4QBz-74peP1ESI0ERYMBqbCUDSaBD_Y_9ChnSHBOPw==).

name: Kelly Loeffler
subject: My opponent is truly radical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
I stand by this statement and I know Georgia, and America, stands with me when I say I am against the radical ideas that my opponent embraces.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012zwSTPhjj8Zdtu0EAeB_5kpoSPtqe1yt5Yha8cIDmpS-KdOzQYambp58kpFXcoJJK98WUnw3C6Kjbp5iTIBcCeE_sKaYTfE8J5vbknbvK7amvQdgARetaegDwKamdb_KNQ1WYetKnkh_ZBiiWfcpI1agQvMnvQho_gPmZuBkoFgW3fUD1aGAgGF4alUQ02mXGb_n51XZ40GZzgqQagycFek4WqHknx_PLN14S_OwfIdDoElXXzyEVaiqc3N2p0TDhvUPk5YAyoWtW12jxfbyO59TIA1oK93dZhu5_IY8Bew7nvzuisetEf0KhhfOTCDHkLYVYksilUdimF4g1vPI5oFe-HsyMxIIio9ePEGXOk11_j635NmztEoY2U0NdT90WFoEVyXnIqYEV10NkxJ4Ikbj1qU5bpxau15oOD0CCbrezZaSRBweMMseHzdGcxiY&c=dWGfe2_qiIXRceuvB8B__Xt3ASFd_1UgN7pxbYL3fkgmPS25GPhAWQ==&ch=m-qmi4Qo3nUR4bQkyJCuv-cPSVG-T2lBU8aDfrCF-MGWQ2fviawqzA==)
Friend,

**Here is the fundamental difference between my opponent and me:

Raphael Warnock believes America is broken and that our very foundation needs to be torn down.

I believe that America is founded on the greatest principles ever established.** That American freedom is precious and unique and, while sometimes imperfect, we have never before seen a system better equipped to deliver on the promise of freedom to so many.

I think we can both agree which of these options is the more radical, un-American position.
[STOP MY RADICAL OPPONNENT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012zwSTPhjj8Zdtu0EAeB_5kpoSPtqe1yt5Yha8cIDmpS-KdOzQYambp58kpFXcoJJK98WUnw3C6Kjbp5iTIBcCeE_sKaYTfE8J5vbknbvK7amvQdgARetaegDwKamdb_KNQ1WYetKnkh_ZBiiWfcpI1agQvMnvQho_gPmZuBkoFgW3fUD1aGAgGF4alUQ02mXGb_n51XZ40GZzgqQagycFek4WqHknx_PLN14S_OwfIdDoElXXzyEVaiqc3N2p0TDhvUPk5YAyoWtW12jxfbyO59TIA1oK93dZhu5_IY8Bew7nvzuisetEf0KhhfOTCDHkLYVYksilUdimF4g1vPI5oFe-HsyMxIIio9ePEGXOk11_j635NmztEoY2U0NdT90WFoEVyXnIqYEV10NkxJ4Ikbj1qU5bpxau15oOD0CCbrezZaSRBweMMseHzdGcxiY&c=dWGfe2_qiIXRceuvB8B__Xt3ASFd_1UgN7pxbYL3fkgmPS25GPhAWQ==&ch=m-qmi4Qo3nUR4bQkyJCuv-cPSVG-T2lBU8aDfrCF-MGWQ2fviawqzA==)
---

_Fighting for America and the values that started this nation should be a prerequisite, not a choice, to being a leader in our government._

**How can one effectively lead and help a nation, if they dislike and want to destroy everything about it?**

It's time we take a serious stand against this insidious and radical outlook that the left has taken on. We cannot let them change America and toss aside our core values for their own political gain.
[STOP THE RADICAL LEFT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012zwSTPhjj8Zdtu0EAeB_5kpoSPtqe1yt5Yha8cIDmpS-KdOzQYambp58kpFXcoJJK98WUnw3C6Kjbp5iTIBcCeE_sKaYTfE8J5vbknbvK7amvQdgARetaegDwKamdb_KNQ1WYetKnkh_ZBiiWfcpI1agQvMnvQho_gPmZuBkoFgW3fUD1aGAgGF4alUQ02mXGb_n51XZ40GZzgqQagycFek4WqHknx_PLN14S_OwfIdDoElXXzyEVaiqc3N2p0TDhvUPk5YAyoWtW12jxfbyO59TIA1oK93dZhu5_IY8Bew7nvzuisetEf0KhhfOTCDHkLYVYksilUdimF4g1vPI5oFe-HsyMxIIio9ePEGXOk11_j635NmztEoY2U0NdT90WFoEVyXnIqYEV10NkxJ4Ikbj1qU5bpxau15oOD0CCbrezZaSRBweMMseHzdGcxiY&c=dWGfe2_qiIXRceuvB8B__Xt3ASFd_1UgN7pxbYL3fkgmPS25GPhAWQ==&ch=m-qmi4Qo3nUR4bQkyJCuv-cPSVG-T2lBU8aDfrCF-MGWQ2fviawqzA==)
---

This fight is far from over, but together we can reject this radical message and protect America.

Thank you for your support,

Kelly Loeffler

name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: I want to talk with you about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Friends,

After four long, arduous years, we won a historic victory last month when the American people overwhelmingly elected Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as the next President and Vice President of the United States. Voters across our country choose empathy, inclusion, and leadership over division and incompetence. Despite having to defend dozens of seats in districts that Trump won — and having to play defense on some very difficult turf here in California — we held our Democratic House Majority. We are now ready to help advance our Democratic agenda as soon as President Biden is sworn in on January 20th.

None of this would have been possible without you and everything you did — even throughout the pandemic — to, truly, save our country. You generously gave your time, your advice, and your resources. From the bottom of my heart, thank you!

I also want to acknowledge the frustration expressed to me by many of my friends and supporters about “what happened” in House, Senate, and state legislative races across the country that we lost. I very much share those feelings with you. Based on polling data relied on by both parties, most of us woke up on Election Day expecting a “Blue Wave” similar to 2018 — where we would not only win the White House, but we would also increase our Democratic Majority in the House, flip the Senate, and win back key state houses so we could have significant influence over redistricting for the next decade. That did not happen.

Anyone who knows me knows that I am not someone who points fingers. But I am someone who always wants answers. Personally, I have been giving "what happened" a lot of thought over the past few weeks.

In the weeks and months ahead, I will continue to insist that the DCCC and our House Democratic Caucus — and, I hope, our friends on the Senate side as well — invest the time and resources to really examine what went wrong, what needs to be adjusted, and where we go from here. We have a short window to right the ship before the midterms begin. We owe it to our voters and to our country to get it right. I personally owe that to you for everything you did to help me.

Even in the most frustrating of times, I try to remain ever the optimist.

Now we look to the January 5th runoffs in Georgia where we have a chance to win a narrow Democratic majority in the Senate. I hope you will take a moment to visit my website to see how you can help [http://www.zoelofgren.com/garunoffs] — even from the safety and comfort of your home – to win these two seats and the Senate majority. My campaign and leadership PAC has already made the maximum contributions.

On a personal note, I also want to thank you for your incredibly generous support of me, my re-election campaign, and my work as Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation. It is an honor to represent my friends, neighbors, and constituents in Washington — and my resolve to defend our shared values in Congress is stronger than ever.

I am very grateful to know that I can count on your support, advice, and encouragement as we face the work ahead.

I would normally say “let’s celebrate our hard-earned election victories and enjoy some downtime during the quickly approaching holiday season” — but, for right now, we have to stay focused on Georgia. Hopefully then we can celebrate — virtually — together!

Thank you once again for everything — and especially for your friendship.

I hope you will stay safe and healthy during the ongoing Covid-19 crisis. And I wish you and your family a very happy holiday season at home.

Zoe

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto]

clean_body: Friends, After four long, arduous years, we won a historic victory last month when the American people overwhelmingly elected Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as the next President and Vice President of the United States. Voters across our country choose empathy, inclusion, and leadership over division and incompetence. Despite having to defend dozens of seats in districts that Trump won — and having to play defense on some very difficult turf here in California — we held our Democratic House Majority. We are now ready to help advance our Democratic agenda as soon as President Biden is sworn in on January 20th. None of this would have been possible without you and everything you did — even throughout the pandemic — to, truly, save our country. You generously gave your time, your advice, and your resources. From the bottom of my heart, thank you! I also want to acknowledge the frustration expressed to me by many of my friends and supporters about “what happened” in House, Senate, and state legislative races across the country that we lost. I very much share those feelings with you. Based on polling data relied on by both parties, most of us woke up on Election Day expecting a “Blue Wave” similar to 2018 — where we would not only win the White House, but we would also increase our Democratic Majority in the House, flip the Senate, and win back key state houses so we could have significant influence over redistricting for the next decade. That did not happen. Anyone who knows me knows that I am not someone who points fingers. But I am someone who always wants answers. Personally, I have been giving "what happened" a lot of thought over the past few weeks. In the weeks and months ahead, I will continue to insist that the DCCC and our House Democratic Caucus — and, I hope, our friends on the Senate side as well — invest the time and resources to really examine what went wrong, what needs to be adjusted, and where we go from here. We have a short window to right the ship before the midterms begin. We owe it to our voters and to our country to get it right. I personally owe that to you for everything you did to help me. Even in the most frustrating of times, I try to remain ever the optimist. Now we look to the January 5th runoffs in Georgia where we have a chance to win a narrow Democratic majority in the Senate. I hope you will take a moment to visit my website to see how you can help [] — even from the safety and comfort of your home – to win these two seats and the Senate majority. My campaign and leadership PAC has already made the maximum contributions. On a personal note, I also want to thank you for your incredibly generous support of me, my re-election campaign, and my work as Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation. It is an honor to represent my friends, neighbors, and constituents in Washington — and my resolve to defend our shared values in Congress is stronger than ever. I am very grateful to know that I can count on your support, advice, and encouragement as we face the work ahead. I would normally say “let’s celebrate our hard-earned election victories and enjoy some downtime during the quickly approaching holiday season” — but, for right now, we have to stay focused on Georgia. Hopefully then we can celebrate — virtually — together! Thank you once again for everything — and especially for your friendship. I hope you will stay safe and healthy during the ongoing Covid-19 crisis. And I wish you and your family a very happy holiday season at home. Zoe Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [] Contributions or gifts to Zoe Lofgren for Congress are not tax deductible.Paid for by Lofgren for Congress

body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/fe57183175fb7762/cec286fa0111701cc3d6b838967d376c/34533) Peter, Today is the day – we are beginning our discovery recount effort, a big step in our effort to #stopthesteal and take on Nancy Pelosi and her desperate efforts to preserve her shrinking majority, and by extension her power, by saving Lauren Underwood’s seat.
We won’t let that happen without a fight – and I need your help in order to make it across the finish line. This discovery recount effort will be expensive, but if every grassroots patriot chips in, we CAN win this. [**Fund 1 Hour Of Recount Work**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/fe57183175fb7762/5b1207d050bdf03ec3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Fund Half A Day Of Recount Work**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/fe57183175fb7762/4b510725e25f9db3c3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Fund 1 Full Day Of Recount Work**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/fe57183175fb7762/9a0539cf43b84f30c3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Fund 1 Hour Of Attorney Fees**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/fe57183175fb7762/501c90f7de970548c3d6b838967d376c/34533) [**Add your best possible contribution**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/fe57183175fb7762/31c940c4330ab1d2c3d6b838967d376c/34533) As I have said before, a discovery recount does not change a single vote, but _**it does allow us to see if the outcome might change with a full recount**_. And this big step starts today, and we’re dropping filings for other areas in the coming days.
[Will you chip in $10 or more right now to help our discovery recount efforts?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/fe57183175fb7762/77d50fb5126fa043c3d6b838967d376c/34533)
For the win,

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Georgia- today is your LAST DAY to register to vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d0/34a064cc/1a9c6a51/7021b5a/833346802/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - This is it! **Today, December 7, is the LAST DAY to register to vote or update your registration for the January 5 runoff elections to elect Georgia 's next U.S. Senators and Public Service Commissioner. ** If you haven't already, check your registration at [registertovote.sos.ga.gov](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d0/34a064cc/1a9c6a51/7021b5b/833346802/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://registertovote.sos.ga.gov"). Once you are registered and all of your information is accurate and up to date, help your friends and family members make sure they are registered to vote, too. Did you know that if an eligible Georgian turns 18 by January 5, 2021 and meets all other eligibility requirements, they can register to vote? If you know any young Georgians with holiday birthdays who are eligible to vote, encourage them to register immediately, today! **Okay I 'm registered! What now?**
* If you plan to vote by mail, request your mail ballot today by visiting [ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d0/34a064cc/1a9c6a51/7021b58/833346802/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov").
* If you've already requested your mail ballot, excellent! Check [georgia.ballottrax.net/voter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d0/34a064cc/1a9c6a51/7021b59/833346802/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter") to confirm it has been mailed out to you and to sign up for updates.
* If you have your ballot, don't delay! Follow the enclosed instructions and complete it now. Don't forget to sign the oath on the outside of the return envelope. Then, drop it off at [a drop box in your county](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d0/34a064cc/1a9c6a51/7021b66/833346802/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/") or at [your county elections office](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d0/34a064cc/1a9c6a51/7021b67/833346802/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://elections.sos.ga.gov/Elections/countyelectionoffices.do"). You can also send it back by mail.
* Once you've dropped off or mailed your ballot, go to [georgia.ballottrax.net/voter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d0/34a064cc/1a9c6a51/7021b59/833346802/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter") to make sure your ballot is received.

**Why vote?** This is your chance to make your voice heard and build on the progress we've made in Georgia and across the country. Over 1 million Georgians have already requested mail ballots because they want to have a say in ensuring that access to healthcare is a right, that we recover from COVID-19, and that justice can be guaranteed! Make your plan to vote today to turn the page to a hopeful future for all Georgians. \- Fair Fight P.S. Do you have questions about registering, or an issue with [ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d0/34a064cc/1a9c6a51/7021b58/833346802/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov")? Don't worry, call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 for help! |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d0/34a064cc/1a9c6a51/7021b64/833346802/VEsP/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d0/34a064cc/1a9c6a51/7021b65/833346802/VEsHBQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d0/34a064cc/1a9c6a51/7021b62/833346802/VEsHBA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

subject: Working For You
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA (R)
body:
I want to hear from you |
---
| |
---
| | **Friends, ** **Just over a month ago, you elected me as your next Commissioner of Securities and Insurance. Since then, I have hit the ground running to ensure a smooth transition. I am hiring key staff, refining a legislative agenda, finding a new home in Helena, and finding bill sponsors for the upcoming 2021 legislative session. ** **We will follow up shortly with a breakdown of our Legislative agenda. If you have any thoughts click[HERE ](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=bc0170525a&e=a212bb87cc)to get in touch with me. I look forward to hearing from you. ** **The election was a hard-fought race but we won the war of ideas and policy. We won on a plan that protects Montanans, promotes transparency, holds bad actors accountable, increases options, and pushes prices lower._Thank you so much for your support._** **The election is over but we still have campaign debt that we need to retire. From day one we ran a campaign that watched every penny but had to overcome the mail, email, and media ads from the massive Congressional and Gubernatorial races to get our message out to voters.** **Last month, you elected me. I immediately went to work for you and continue to do so. I am now asking you to help me finish up the campaign and wrap up our campaign debt. I want to wrap up this part quickly so I may work exclusively on lowering insurance rates, promoting transparency, lowering prescription drug prices, eliminating burdensome regulation, and protecting Montanans. ** **Please consider chipping in a few dollars to help us retire our campaign debt. We won on November 3rd because of you. Please help us finish this campaign as strong as we started. ** **Fond Regards,** **Commissioner-Elect Troy Downing**
#

subject: The Senate

subject: Double checking your records, everyone -- does this look right?

body:
Hello -- Maggie Hassan just launched her campaign for U.S. Senate, and pundits are already saying she's one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection.
She only won her last race by 1,017 and with all eyes on New Hampshire, it's critical that her campaign kicks off with a groundswell of grassroots support.
We just checked -- it looks like you haven't had a chance to donate and become a Founding Member of her campaign. [**Will you please rush $3 or more right now to stand with Maggie from the start and protect New Hampshire 's vulnerable Senate seat?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc656/2a380d31/21ef5e28/f05ace/3544147362/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9hbm5vdW5jZSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAxMjA3X2Fubm91bmNlLXNyX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_announce?refcode=e20201207_announce-sr_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com

[**Suggested Donation Amount: $3**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc656/2a380d31/21ef5e28/f05ace/3544147362/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9hbm5vdW5jZSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAxMjA3X2Fubm91bmNlLXNyX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_announce?refcode=e20201207_announce-sr_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc656/2a380d31/21ef5e28/f05ace/3544147362/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9hbm5vdW5jZSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAxMjA3X2Fubm91bmNlLXNyX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_announce?refcode=e20201207_announce-sr_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
When the Senate was on the verge of repealing the Affordable Care Act, Maggie cast one of the deciding votes to protect it. And, she's been a champion for addressing the COVID-19 pandemic, fighting climate change, and ensuring that every single hardworking family has the chance to get ahead and stay ahead.
Bottom line? Senator Hassan isn't afraid to roll up her sleeves and get the work done. We know that you're not either. [**Senate control could come down to this race so if you can, please donate $3 or more right now to reelect Maggie Hassan and ensure a Democratic majority.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc656/2a380d31/21ef5e28/f05ace/3544147362/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9hbm5vdW5jZSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAxMjA3X2Fubm91bmNlLXNyX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_announce?refcode=e20201207_announce-sr_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

clean_body: Hello -- Maggie Hassan just launched her campaign for U.S. Senate, and pundits are already saying she's one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection. She only won her last race by 1,017 and with all eyes on New Hampshire, it's critical that her campaign kicks off with a groundswell of grassroots support. We just checked -- it looks like you haven't had a chance to donate and become a Founding Member of her campaign. "" Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com 2022 Founding Member Status: pending "" Founding Member Window: December 4 - December 11 "" When the Senate was on the verge of repealing the Affordable Care Act, Maggie cast one of the deciding votes to protect it. And, she's been a champion for addressing the COVID-19 pandemic, fighting climate change, and ensuring that every single hardworking family has the chance to get ahead and stay ahead. Bottom line? Senator Hassan isn't afraid to roll up her sleeves and get the work done. We know that you're not either. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" Thank you, Senator Hassan's campaign staff P.S. -- If you've donated recently or made a contribution via check or using a different email, don't worry. We've received it, it's just still processing. Thank you so much for your support! ""

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Join the frontlines
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Rhode Island's health care workers have been working around the clock to keep us safe from COVID-19. Health care workers are human beings - moms and dads and sons and daughters who have been at it for nine months without a break. They're tired, they're strained, and they need backup. Earlier this year, when we put out calls for substitute teachers and contact tracers, we had hundreds of people raise their hands in a matter of days. I'm asking all available health care workers to do the same.
Last week, the Department of Health again began issuing temporary licenses to retirees, visiting health care workers, and others who are completing their training programs. If you're a retired health care worker, or a health care worker who is currently unemployed or not working in a health care setting, and you're willing to work the floors in our hospitals and nursing homes to help us manage this surge, we need you. You can learn more about immediately available positions at [SkillsforRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HwR_l8XpcQy-uASM78bCpDJH0Ozsdy10E5AhyiRxbmFICZNpeWoUUViedDEf3g7w5TGyiZSU_-S0c33_2F7O_SS7sCHBEdWmkkN4FvqG4haCS2mL6TcOkBKxUSrrwfFeRtCwrJDuQ1m29pLEyjFY5w==&c=Fs_gLRKU92DtI30VpzsUbfyEGwf6AAOo0Mvq7-JGNoRabWr2-67U5Q==&ch=dRzfI_CQlmqUKTA-2h5WTlTmss4u87Syxfuch8pNfURk7-w_a08WeQ==).
Even if you're not a trained health care worker, it's still all-hands-on-deck and we could use your help. If you have physical or mental health experience but can't commit to full-time work in our hospitals or nursing homes, or if you don't have health care experience but want to volunteer to assist our statewide response in other ways, please visit [RIResponds.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HwR_l8XpcQy-uASM78bCpDJH0Ozsdy10E5AhyiRxbmFICZNpeWoUUYRjz0iOfuakMQGhrROVfGzt_DDv5lV7sbC5mjertUIkv3kOaxSVQxHhfKrL2FXZMRnsYP2bpY9vBwq3_2kg0kw=&c=Fs_gLRKU92DtI30VpzsUbfyEGwf6AAOo0Mvq7-JGNoRabWr2-67U5Q==&ch=dRzfI_CQlmqUKTA-2h5WTlTmss4u87Syxfuch8pNfURk7-w_a08WeQ==) to sign up as a response volunteer.
There's a lot to do across our response, and we need as many hands as we can get. If you have the time, please consider being a part of this effort. Your support will make all the difference as we work together to reduce the strain on our health care system and save lives.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HwR_l8XpcQy-uASM78bCpDJH0Ozsdy10E5AhyiRxbmFICZNpeWoUUcliPdoeXnYmeNH9gF2tqCiM5nqdfmlzuXQmCH92RDRBtIsUkPG3ixnr9W0ixt4uZaCLGnfqxOPHiC3NgKGWZ0jMC5bIhbm0l7-h3xiDavVt4D-KfXAGq_e10I7eGzzkIi-7wyvfc2OIEtum16Oj6xsnVWa8szaNWKPqziMu7jD6SK0L78JmkYQt8sB-WVx7eDjJxlMX9k8vP3RgGNCGTlRpBM8r0T3x3qoZqoRvlmQZRecog0Q0kHnActcA5eJFXhdEYIbj-MhusDLpCotE47I=&c=Fs_gLRKU92DtI30VpzsUbfyEGwf6AAOo0Mvq7-JGNoRabWr2-67U5Q==&ch=dRzfI_CQlmqUKTA-2h5WTlTmss4u87Syxfuch8pNfURk7-w_a08WeQ==).

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Join us for a thank you reception!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

These past two years have been incredibly special. I am honored and humbled
by the support that our campaign received. This campaign was not powered by
special interests in Washington, but by the grassroots enthusiasm of our
volunteers and supporters right here in Houston.

Emily and I are eternally grateful to each and every one of you for inviting
us into your homes, contributing your hard earned money, and, most importantly,
spending countless hours speaking to your friends, neighbors and family about
the values we hold dear.

That's why this Friday, December 11th, Emily and I would like to invite you
to join us at Becks Prime in Memorial Park at 5:30pm so that we can say thank
you for all of your hard work and dedication.

I hope you'll be able to join us to celebrate all that we accomplished and to
bring in the holiday season!

Please RSVP to info@wesleyfortexas.com if you're able to attend.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Greg Pence
subject: the true cost of socialized healthcare

We can’t let Democratic socialists like Bernie Sanders and AOC take control of healthcare out of the hands of Americans [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=09111ad8f8234038b9cd584361017354&_e=Jz9OMDcXO-PNRi-vrkEnMH_8XEgrJpflUXnZJrEtPcEvxli0Dc4Itqp37FOzt57JtipM49CtwExn9yEQPhc8LtW-HCNBjXgcZJaRHsakF4GIyR8s-0D5A1GVXaD4zJKK5ZUU80gKmD4XnlPZP1zFPaffBsZBn0ZUOwwaz1Ed4tvacSbubWvxSeDC8lu5TYeUhAU4AOV7H6jLO4CQN3zt9KwzJrHQ3Yf168GhwcoOqPSn7cV5mbXlYuByKf2YK7V7LEgEOvzJHWXOSy07Bpb6h9aGG5d2cnaMvY3nr5wms62sOQHhk2swK1YYqmhhVWYsWl_RKjhHK3XlogO0NPSHrfc9J2GuBkURUELljO7hv3myKAHjtoAc93H8baMEjdbTMPLE_6V9VV4V-DrH4t4hljstupdNdF1og0PvNSpTZ_3FO8D4IP2zER-RjTgWE77g-pcsAMcvZMfWjPOYLCXQJtIy4t862RD6S-irFSLosb0%3D) Friend, Thanks to Democratic socialists like Bernie Sanders and AOC, we’re going to be hearing a lot about socialized healthcare and Medicare for All in 2021. **That’s why we need to set the record straight about the TRUE cost of their government-run healthcare plans before it’s too late. ** _Here’s the facts:_
* Medicare for All would cost taxpayers over _**$32 TRILLION**_ over the next 10 years
* Americans of all walks of life would be **denied access** to high-quality care and the freedom to choose what’s best for them at the doctor’s office
* Countless middle-class families and small businesses would face **bankruptcy** under an onslaught of new taxes –– the absolute last thing our economy can afford right now!

Friend, that list barely scratches the surface of the long-lasting negative effects that the Left’s radical healthcare proposals would have on current and future generations of Americans. _We can’t let them take control of healthcare out of the hands of Americans who need it most. Will you add your name to join me in standing against the Left’s dream of Medicare for All?_ [**ADD YOUR NAME: Reject Socialized Healthcare**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=09111ad8f8234038b9cd584361017354&_e=Jz9OMDcXO-PNRi-vrkEnMH_8XEgrJpflUXnZJrEtPcEvxli0Dc4Itqp37FOzt57JtipM49CtwExn9yEQPhc8LtW-HCNBjXgcZJaRHsakF4GIyR8s-0D5A1GVXaD4zJKK5ZUU80gKmD4XnlPZP1zFPaffBsZBn0ZUOwwaz1Ed4tvacSbubWvxSeDC8lu5TYeUhAU4AOV7H6jLO4CQN3zt9KwzJrHQ3Yf168GhwcoOqPSn7cV5mbXlYuByKf2YK7V7LEgEOvzJHWXOSy07Bpb6h5HbdphZ8a-ymHG5RhP4oyOQCrxO0njim4t-Cg7_n4pk-cFce8sMOfRE71DCZhitrdSg_k2SKEAPzF9zOwz-MQ3yNtTfojb5Jb1gsrsnZB0PBjPD9w4WNzn4SLvWuq9H6FR5NLA439WAY7spfvXQdTbT8AxwFwPmi6zFETr89OP-L4h0okKSNVpj8CHXhVk-_ZsfacZPuiRRYyd-vM4Ri9s%3D) Thank you, Greg Pence |

clean_body: We can’t let Democratic socialists like Bernie Sanders and AOC take control of healthcare out of the hands of Americans Friend, Thanks to Democratic socialists like Bernie Sanders and AOC, we’re going to be hearing a lot about socialized healthcare and Medicare for All in 2021. That’s why we need to set the record straight about the TRUE cost of their government-run healthcare plans before it’s too late. Here’s the facts: Medicare for All would cost taxpayers over $32 TRILLION over the next 10 years Americans of all walks of life would be denied access to high-quality care and the freedom to choose what’s best for them at the doctor’s office Countless middle-class families and small businesses would face bankruptcy** under an onslaught of new taxes –– the absolute last thing our economy can afford right now! Friend, that list barely scratches the surface of the long-lasting negative effects that the Left’s radical healthcare proposals would have on current and future generations of Americans. We can’t let them take control of healthcare out of the hands of Americans who need it most. Will you add your name to join me in standing against the Left’s dream of Medicare for All? name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: TSA Program to Protect Aviation from High Risk Passengers Failing after Eight Years
body:
A controversial government program launched nearly a decade ago to protect airline safety has failed miserably to meet its “mission of mitigating the threat to commercial aviation,” according to a scathing federal audit sprinkled with redactions to protect “sensitive security information.” Known as Quiet Skies, the program was launched jointly by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) and the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) in early 2012.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 07, 2020
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52214&L=21355&F=H&) | **[Three Members of Congress Star in Forum with Terror Financiers, Anti-Semites](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52214&L=21355&F=H&)** Congress should reprimand three of its members for participating with financiers of Islamic terrorism in a conference sponsored by an anti-Semitic group with deep ties to Hamas, the Palestinian extremist group that calls for eradicating the state of Israel. The legislators who joined forces with the extremists over the Thanksgiving weekend include Ilhan Omar and Betty McCollum of Minnesota and Rashida Tlaib of Michigan. clean_body: A controversial government program launched nearly a decade ago to protect airline safety has failed miserably to meet its “mission of mitigating the threat to commercial aviation,” according to a scathing federal audit sprinkled with redactions to protect “sensitive security information.” Known as Quiet Skies, the program was launched jointly by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) and the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) in early 2012. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 07, 2020 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Congress should reprimand three of its members for participating with financiers of Islamic terrorism in a conference sponsored by an anti-Semitic group with deep ties to Hamas, the Palestinian extremist group that calls for eradicating the state of Israel. The legislators who joined forces with the extremists over the Thanksgiving weekend include Ilhan Omar and Betty McCollum of Minnesota and Rashida Tlaib of Michigan. ---|--- | | | | = | = A controversial government program launched nearly a decade ago to protect airline safety has failed miserably to meet its “mission of mitigating the threat to commercial aviation,” according to a scathing federal audit sprinkled with redactions to protect “sensitive security information.” = ---|--- | | | | | While a number of conservative members of Congress have sought to reform the laws surrounding censorship on social media platforms, Facebook, Youtube, and Twitter have continued to censor Judicial Watch and its President, Tom Fitton. “Maybe we’ll sue, I don’t know,” Fitton explained. “Get a court to come in and say you’re lying to your customers, you’re lying to consumers when you say these terms of service are being fairly implemented and aren’t being changed on the whim depending on who you are, and your politics.” ---|--- | | | | == | == The minutes of a DHS “Enterprise Security Operations Center” (ESOC) meeting indicate that on November 15, 2016, at 8:43 a.m. a “scanning event” occurred. The “‘scanning’ event was the result of a FLETC [Federal Law Enforcement Training Center] user’s Microsoft Office Discovery Protocol sending a packet with the OPTIONS flag to the Secretary of State of Georgia site.” == ---|--- | | | = The Daily Caller The Daily Caller News Foundation and Judicial Watch had sued the State Department for the same documents, though they were almost entirely redacted. The unredacted versions released on Thursday provide details of information that Steele provided State Department officials regarding Russia and Ukraine. = = Breitbart Judicial Watch, a conservative legal advocacy group, said, “Congress should reprimand three of its members for participating with financiers of Islamic terrorism in a conference sponsored by an anti-Semitic group with deep ties to Hamas, the Palestinian extremist group that calls for eradicating the state of Israel.” = == CBN News On Thursday, the government watchdog Judicial Watch announced it received 243 pages of records from the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) that show the Obama administration scanned the election systems of Georgia, Alaska, Oregon, Kentucky, and West Virginia in 2016. == = = = = == == | CLIPS = == TWEETS | | | | | = ---|---|--- HUGE: Fauci emails show he directly approved WHO praise of China communist Covid response. 9:36 AM · Dec 7, 2020 | | | | | = ---|---|--- Calif. officials demand changes to sanctuary city policy after repeat felon kills 2 people at church (@JudicialWatch pursuing court challenge now against this deadly and lawless sanctuary policy) 1:18 PM · Dec 7, 2020 | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2020, All Rights Reserved == |
